    <h2 {...{
      "id": "managed-integration"

    <p>{`The SDK manages the chat lifecycle. Provide a trigger UI element — the SDK shows it when the extension is ready and opens the chat as a full-screen dialog when the trigger is invoked.`}</p>

    handleLink: LinkHandler? = null,
    content: @Composable (showChat: () -> Unit) -> Unit
)
`}</code></pre>

Return `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`true`}</inlineCode>{` to claim the URL; return `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`false`}</inlineCode>{` for default behavior.`}</li>

Obtain via `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`viewModel<ConciergeChatViewModel>()`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><em parentName="li">{`onClose`}</em>{` `}<strong parentName="li">{`required`}</strong>{` - Callback invoked when the user dismisses the chat (back press, close button, or gesture).`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><em parentName="li">{`modifier`}</em>{` - Optional `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Modifier`}</inlineCode>{` to apply to the composable.`}</li>

Return `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`true`}</inlineCode>{` to claim the URL; return `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`false`}</inlineCode>{` for default behavior.`}</li>

    <h4 {...{
      "id": "example-2"
    }}>{`Example`}</h4>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-kotlin"
      }}>{`@Composable
fun YourChatScreen() {
    val viewModel = viewModel<ConciergeChatViewModel>()
    val conciergeState by ConciergeStateRepository.instance.state.collectAsStateWithLifecycle()
    val surfaces = listOf("web://example.com/your-surface.html")

    ConciergeStateRepository.instance.setSessionSurfaces(surfaces)

    val ready = conciergeState.configurationReady &&
        conciergeState.experienceCloudId != null &&
        conciergeState.surfaces.isNotEmpty()

    if (ready) {
        ConciergeChat(
            viewModel = viewModel,
            onClose = { /* navigate back */ }
        )
    }
}
`}</code></pre>
